results.details: Player ended at (-6.59, 15.80, 0.00) which is NOT walkable after 1.5s. Boundary did not push player back.
MapFragment did not spawn within 3s after RoomCleared. Check: MapFragmentBridge.useFragmentGateFlow, FragmentDropAnchor present, room category = Combat/BossApproach.

Target HP unchanged: 100 → 100. Possible causes: attack range < 2u, FacingDirection not pointing at target, or PlayerAttack.basicAttackProfile hit range = 0. BLOCKED NOTE: PlayerAttack uses InputAction('<Mouse>/leftButton') internally. InputTestFixture.Press(mouse.leftButton) injects into virtual device but PlayerAttack binds at Awake via new InputAction — may not see the virtual device. Workaround: expose a TestAttack() method on PlayerAttack to bypass input.
